summary: Financial Decision Engine UI Enhancement Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Dashboard transformed with Financial Decision Engine branding, 4 key metrics, Financial Health Score gauge (74/100, Grade B), Top Actions with $ impact and rank badges, Total Potential Impact (+$609K), Net Worth Projection chart (2025 → 2040), Wealth Milestones, Goal Progress with On Track/Behind badges, and What-If toggle. Scenario Comparison has stress test presets working. All CRM tabs functional.
